name: Power Dunk (Just Frame)
notes: () refers to scaled damage from CH 5MP combo starter; extra damage when performed within a strict 2f timing window (success indicated by screen shake); can only be performed on hit; useful for corner carry and oki

name: Quick Burn
notes: 2 hits that transition to a 3rd attack on hit only; functionally 22f startup as an overhead

name: Twin Geyser
notes: Follow-up to Power Geyser for 3 Drive bars (on hit only); can also be followed up with SA1, 214MP, Drive Rush juggles, or more in the corner; the damage on non-Super follow-ups is extremely low when starting from raw SA2 due to starter scaling; attempting to input Triple Geyser follow-up without enough meter results in a whiffed attack that leaves Terry at -3 KD Advantage; no invincibility at all (can be hit by lingering moves like Kimberly's spraycan)

name: Triple Geyser
notes: Follow-up to Twin Geyser for 1 extra Super bar; attempting to input without a full Super meter results in a whiffed attack that leaves Terry at -3 KD Advantage

name: Neutral Taunt (Burnout)
notes: "Hey buddy, I got tons of fight left in me!"; only occurs when Terry is in Burnout

name: Back Taunt
notes: "We gonna fight or what? I don't have all day. *whistle* Jeez."
